description: CompositionBlue round neck t-shirt in 100% cotton, with bold black printFittingSlimWash care Light machine wash Do not scrub Do not bleach  Warm iron on reverse Do not dry clean  Dry flat/ reverse  Indulge in the fantasy of leaving behind the snobbery of civilisation and travel into the wild in this blue tee from wrangler. With a bold cowboy graphic splayed across the chest, this cotton t-shirt is infused with the rustic cowboy spirit. Team this with jeans and a pair of stylish footwear from the wide international range available at myntra and stay cool and comfortable through all seasons in this pure cotton tee.Model's statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-18"
